$comment: Central platform configuration — the only file a new client must edit. Defines solution areas, all environments (with URLs), and deployment packages. Scripts and workflows read from here instead of having hardcoded values.

environments.$comment_organizationSettings: Optional. Dataverse Organization entity logical names → values. Applied by EnvironmentSettingsService during package deploy before solution import. Keys are lowercase logical names from the Dataverse 'organization' table (find them via XrmToolBox Metadata Browser or by querying /api/data/v9.2/organizations). Values are always strings — the service reads attribute metadata and converts to the correct type (bool, int, etc.) before writing. Omit or leave as {} if no org-level settings are needed.

packageGroups.name: {{SOLUTION_NAME}}
packageGroups.$comment_managedIdentities: Optional. Add one entry per managed identity in this package. 'name' must be the managedidentityid GUID from customizations.xml — Power Platform does not always write a <name> child element, so the GUID is the reliable lookup key. Find it in src/solutions/{solution}/ManagedIdentities/{folder}/managedidentity.xml (managedidentityid attribute) or via: pac managed-identity get --environment <url>. 'solutionName' is the solution unique name containing the MI. 'perEnvironment' maps each deployment environment slug to its Azure AD applicationId and tenantId.
